title: New AI Insights Feature Available
content: We've launched our new AI-powered nutrition insights feature. Check the AI Insights page to get personalized recommendations.

title: System Maintenance Scheduled
content: Scheduled maintenance on April 20, 2026 from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM UTC. The system will be unavailable during this period.
author: System Admin

content: The Data Warehouse now supports advanced filtering and custom report generation.

title: New Training Course Available
content: Join our new training course 'Advanced Nutrition Analysis' starting next week.
